summary.title: DS9 eligibility review queue
summary.law: GROW.md — a real, verifiable performer who vanishes under a designed face
summary.contract: Machines collect/pin/hash/verify evidence and prepare this queue. Verdicts come ONLY from the owner decisions file. Everything undecided is review. Signals (voice-only, bare-faced) are hints, not verdicts. Species is context only.
